# MotorVault LLM Index

## Overview
MotorVault is an automotive parts marketplace with verified sellers, product browsing, checkout, account management, and support content.

## Primary Pages
- https://motorvault.shop/
- https://motorvault.shop/products
- https://motorvault.shop/cart
- https://motorvault.shop/checkout
- https://motorvault.shop/about
- https://motorvault.shop/help
- https://motorvault.shop/contact
- https://motorvault.shop/shipping
- https://motorvault.shop/returns
- https://motorvault.shop/privacy
- https://motorvault.shop/terms

## Product Discovery
- Search and filter product catalog by brand, model, category, condition, price, and availability.
- Product detail pages include pricing, availability, images, and related items.
- Checkout supports cart totals, shipping, and payment processing.

## Structured Data
- Organization
- WebSite
- Product
- BreadcrumbList
- LocalBusiness

## Crawl Targets
- Sitemap: https://motorvault.shop/sitemap.xml
- Product sitemap: https://motorvault.shop/sitemap-products.xml
- Robots: https://motorvault.shop/robots.txt

## Notes
- Public pages are intended for indexing.
- Authenticated pages should not be crawled or indexed.
